race.comment: MARTINI MUMMA (9) handy mare who finds a winnable race second-up with the claim. Far from disgraced on resumption with a fighting fourth over 1200m at Randwick. Nose roll goes on and this looks an easier race. INDI SPRINGS (13) has gone to a new level this prep and deserves her chance here. Sat on the speed when she ploughed through the heavy going for a dominant win over this trip at Bathurst. Has the wide gate to contend with and don't underestimate with the claim. POLYMER (14) has gone to a new level for the new yard and not to be underestimated in this harder contest. Looked to have plenty in reserve when he came from midfield to score over 1210m at Port Macquarie in C1 class. Handles all conditions and stays in the mix. NEESON (2) has a stack of gear changes for this with winning rider going back aboard. Place best. SHE WITHIN (22) is holding her form in this grade and should sneak into the field. Good set-up for this and sure to be thereabouts.
